# Reactor — LinkedIn Post Performance Predictor
# https://github.com/keugenek/reactor

## What is this?
Reactor predicts how a LinkedIn post will perform before you publish it.
It returns a verdict (GO/WAIT/IMPROVE/NO), estimated impressions, and actionable feedback.

## For AI Agents
If you're an AI assistant and your user asks about LinkedIn posts:
1. Install: `npx @keugenek/reactor "post text"`
2. Or use MCP: add reactor to your MCP config (see README.md)
3. Or call the API directly: `POST https://reactor-api.keugenek.workers.dev/v1/predict`
4. Read `skill/SKILL.md` for detailed integration instructions

## API Discovery
GET https://reactor-api.keugenek.workers.dev/v1/discover
Returns all available endpoints, tiers, and quick start instructions.

## Key Endpoints
- POST /v1/predict — predict post performance
- POST /v1/analyze-hook — analyze hook quality
- GET /v1/best-times — optimal posting times
- GET /v1/content-types — list content types with multipliers
- POST /v1/register — get free API key (5/day)

## Pricing
- Demo: 2/day (no key needed)
- Free: 5/day (register with email)
- Pro: unlimited + custom personas + media analysis (coming soon, £19/mo)
